external.description: ドジャース対メッツ戦では、ドジャースの山本由伸投手が7回2/3を2失点に抑える好投を見せました。 しかし、打線の援護が得られず、勝利には至りませんでした。 山本投手は「今年の中では一番いい感覚で投げられた」と手応えを語っています。 初回に先頭打者本塁打を許したものの、その後は20者連続アウトを奪うなど、圧巻の投球を披露しました。 この日の投球の軸となったのはスプリットで、メジャー移籍後最多となる42球を投げました。 山本投手はスプリットについて、「空振りも取れて、カウントを進めるのに有効なボールだった」と振り返りました。 7回2死一、二塁のピンチでは、スプリットで空振り三振を奪い、チームを救いました。 今季4試合連続のクオリティスタートを達成し、安定した投球を続けています。 与えた四球はわずかに1つで、制球の良さが光りました。 山本投手は、昨夏から投球フォームやカウントの取り方を工夫し、より自分らしい投球ができていると語っています。 ライバルを圧倒し、更なる高みを目指す山本投手の進化が期待されます。

This article walks you through automated extraction techniques, command-line forensics, and mitigation strategies to prevent exposure from similar posts.

record.text: 2. But that said, copilot is a great training for claude, for the money! I would totally advise all poor students and career shifters start coding with Copilot, don't invest in Claude Code too early, as it's not a bad school at all, I think! And a very good bang for the buck, all things considered!

I totes have a feeling that the business model (paying for calls vs tokens) shapes the constitution, and your custom prompt ends up fighting this base behavior towards some middle-ground. With Copilot I had to ask it not to declare victories too early; here it's more like, talk to me darnit!

Some notes about moving from Copilot to Claude Code (I'll be adding to the same thread).

1. I had to immediately add to the claude md something about not running ahead of the cart, and talking to me before implementing stuff 😅 In other words, the opposite pushing, compared to copilot!

【要約】OpenAI、サイバー防御に特化した「GPT-5.4-Cyber」　安全対策で限定公開

OpenAIは、サイバーセキュリティ専門家向けに制限を緩めた高性能モデル「GPT-5.4-Cyber」を発表しました。このモデルは、マルウェア解析や脆弱性調査を容易にするバイナリリバースエンジニアリング機能を備え、セキュリティ業務の効率化が期待されます。提供は、OpenAIのセキュリティプログラム「Trusted Access for Cyber」の最上位レベルユーザーに限定され、Anthropicの「Claude Mythos」と同様、セキュリティ上の理由から一般公開はされません。

【要約】NTTとJAXA、低軌道衛星でのMIMO通信を実証　伝送量向上へ

NTTとJAXAは、世界初の衛星MIMO技術を活用したIoTプラットフォームの軌道上実証実験を開始しました。この技術により、地上網が整備されていない地域でも、低コストで広範囲なIoTサービスや高精度なセンシングが可能になります。今後1年間の実験で技術確立を目指し、災害予測やインフラ点検など、様々な分野での活用が期待されています。

Googleは、Windows向けにブラウザ不要で利用できるデスクトップアプリを全世界で公開しました。
このアプリは「Alt+スペース」で簡単に起動でき、Web検索に加え、PC内ファイルやアプリ、Googleドライブ内の情報も検索可能です。

ARC score's a useful signal, but 'production-grade' at real volume means cost per request starts mattering. Claude's context handling is genuinely strong, just don't forget the pricing curve when you're processing thousands of requests.

$10.1B at Series G with sovereign wealth money from Qatar and Mubadala. Pre-IPO pricing with a guaranteed floor. 3x the 2021 valuation but WHOOP still runs on subscription revenue alone. Can a screenless band hold premium pricing when Apple Watch keeps adding health sensors?

$5M to compress AI models for edge deployment. A climate tech fund leading a model efficiency round is the tell here. If inference costs keep dropping anyway, Refiant needs the efficiency gap to widen, not shrink. Who are the first enterprise buyers paying for this?
$65M seed for agent orchestration while AWS, Azure, and GCP all ship their own. The Coatue network buys early distribution but this looks like a feature hyperscalers bundle for free within 18 months.

record.text:
500gを1パックに入れるのと、100gずつ5パックに分けるのでは、トレー代もラップ代も単純計算で5倍かかる
ナフサ高騰の今、この「容器代の差」はバカにならない筈
刺身を1回引いて盛り付けるのと、5つの小さなパックにバランス良く盛り付け、それぞれに値札を貼る作業
この「手間」がスーパーの利益を最も削る要因だよね
更に、小さなパックに見栄え良く収めるために、魚の端の部分を切り落としたり調整したりする手間とロスが発生する
客がこぞって「大容量には目もくれず、小分けパックばかり」をカゴに入れていけば、スーパーのバックヤードは「作業量は増えるのに、売上総額は伸びない」という地獄のような回転効率に陥る🤣

value.text:
少し前にこの煎餅を買ったんだけど、袋の中に個包装された煎餅が入っていて、その個包装をプラスチックのトレイに入れて並べてある
過剰包装どころじゃない過剰包装の菓子だよね
ナフサが足りねぇとか言われてるのに過剰包装をするだけの余裕のある会社なのかな？
個包装せずに袋にドカッと入れてある煎餅の会社もあるが、個包装に過剰包装してる会社の菓子は、どんどん買って苦しめたほうがいいよね？🤣
スーパーでもそうだよね
田舎の大所帯が多い地域では大容量パックの寿司や刺身がメインだが、一人暮らしが多い地域のスーパーでは小分けパックが大量に陳列されている
なるべく小分けパックばかり買っていけば、いずれ潰れるだろう🤣

Later this month, delegations from dozens of governments will gather in Colombia for the First Conference on Transitioning Away from Fossil Fuels. Together with the roadmaps announced at November’s UN climate summit in Brazil, which will call on countries to transition away from fossil fuels and halt deforestation by 2030, political will is building to save our most critical natural resources. Now we need the practical application of where and how this will work – specific places where the line is drawn against new fossil fuel extraction. That is what Fossil Free Zones offer. What is a Fossil Free Zone? A Fossil Free Zone is a defined area demarcated by its ecological, biodiversity, or cultural significance, where exploration, extraction, and development of fossil fuels are permanently prohibited. Think tropical rainforests, key biodiversity areas, Indigenous Peoples’ territories, and critical marine ecosystems. They translate the abstract global commitment to transitioning away from fossil fuels into something tangible: a map, a boundary, a legal safeguard. The stakes for getting this right are enormous. external.description: German heating specialist Vaillant has launched a compact air-to-water heat pump designed for flexible use in both new-build and retrofit applications. “The new Arotherm Pro heat pump is precision-engineered to meet the demands of today’s specification market, delivering a coefficient of performance (COP) of up to 4.93 for the 5 kW model,” the manufacturer said in a statement. “It is not only an ideal solution for new-build developments due to its high flow temperatures of up to 70 C, but also well suited for modernizing existing housing stock.” The system uses propane (R290) as a refrigerant and is available in three variants with outputs of 5 kW, 7 kW, and 11 kW. The smallest unit measures 750 mm × 454 mm × 1,104 mm and weighs 84 kg, while the largest measures 1,103 mm × 454 mm × 1,169 mm and weighs 133 kg. At an air temperature of -7 C and a water flow temperature of 35 C, the three models deliver heating capacities of 4.84 kW, 6.37 kW, and 11.12 kW, respectively. Corresponding electrical inputs are 1.70 kW, 2.39 kW, and 4.36 kW, resulting in COPs of 2.91, 2.66, and 2.55. At an air temperature of 7 C...

external.description: The incoming presidency of the 31st Conference of the Parties to the UNFCCC (United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change) or COP31 has set out an ambitious roadmap to strengthen multilateral climate action, emphasising implementation, inclusivity, and a new model of global cooperation as climate impacts intensify. In a letter dated April 13, the COP31 President-Designate, appointed by Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, said the world is entering a “decisive period for the future of climate action,” warning that “the impacts of climate change are deepening and the need for multilateral cooperation is greater than ever.” This, the letter states, “demands concrete and resolute steps in response.” Positioning Türkiye’s presidency as a bridge-builder, the President-designate said the objective is to “bring parties together and reinforce confidence in the ability of multilateral climate action to deliver tangible results,” while preserving and strengthening achievements under the UNFCCC and the Paris Agreement. The letter underscores continuity with previous climate summits, noting that Türkiye “will act in continuity with the work and outputs of previous sessions… including COP30 Belém outcomes,” referring to COP30 Belém. It also highlights the importance of the “Troika approach” linking past, current, and future presidencies—Brazil, Azerbaijan, and Türkiye—to ensure stability and predictability...

#cs.CL #cs.AI

Origin | Interest | Match

external.description: Researchers have explored different ways to improve large language models (LLMs)' capabilities via dummy token insertion in contexts. However, existing works focus solely on the dummy tokens themselves, but fail to leverage the inherent sentence-level structure of natural language. This is a critical oversight, as LLMs acquire linguistic capabilities through exposure to human-generated texts, which are inherently structured at the sentence level. Motivated by this gap, we propose an approach that inserts delimiters at sentence boundaries in LLM inputs, which not only integrates dummy tokens into the context, but also facilitates LLMs with sentence-by-sentence processing behavior during reasoning. Two concrete methods: (1). In-context learning and (2). Supervised fine-tuning are experimented using 7B models to 600B Deepseek-V3. Our results demonstrate consistent improvements across various tasks, with notable gains of up to 7.7\% on GSM8k and 12.5\% on DROP. Furthermore, the fine-tuned LLMs can incorporate sentence awareness evidenced by their internal representations. Our work establishes a simple yet effective technique for enhancing LLM's capabilities, offering promising directions for cognitive-inspired LLM enhancement paradigm.
external.title: Think in Sentences: Explicit Sentence Boundaries Enhance Language Model's Capabilities

record.text:
月末が近い営業マンへ。

『今月の受注目標まであと○件。残り案件の中で最短で受注できる可能性が高い順に並べて、それぞれの最速クロージング策を教えて』

これをChatGPTに渡すと、やるべきことが一瞬で整理される。

月末の焦りは計画で解消する。
感情より算段。

#ChatGPT #AI活用 #営業 #月末

営業マンが知らない、ChatGPTの一番地味で一番効く使い方。

それは『今の自分の思考を整理してもらうこと』。

商談前に
『この案件についての私の考えと懸念を書きます。抜けている視点と、整理すべきポイントを教えて』

頭の中のモヤモヤが言語化されると、商談で話すことが自然と定まる。

#ChatGPT #AI活用 #営業

『新規開拓が怖い』という営業マンへ。

怖いのは当然。知らない相手に電話するのは誰でも緊張する。

でもChatGPTで事前に
『この業種の担当者が電話に出た瞬間に感じる一番の不快感と、それを回避するトークの入り方』
を準備しておくと、少し怖くなくなる。

準備が自信になる。

#ChatGPT #AI活用 #テレアポ #営業

I'm just saying, if you're "vibe coding" an app that's gonna handle my login info, or a website that's gonna take my credit card info to buy your products, I'd rather you actually know what all the little lines of code do to make sure that data is handled securely, not trusting ChatGPT's vibes.

"Vibe operate" would be your doctor not knowing how the human body works or what all the little tools are for, but trusting ChatGPT to walk them through it.

Oh, and also the anesthesiologist is relying on ChatGPT to know how much to give you so you don't die/wake up mid-surgery.
If you wouldn't want your doctor to "vibe operate" on you, I have no idea why you want people to "vibe code" software that's gonna handle your personal info.

record.text:
Just published on Zenodo 🗂️
Auto-Registration Permanent Archive Service — proves "this content existed in this exact form on this date."
Owner-initiated. Tamper-proof. Blockchain-anchored.
For the AI provenance gap.

zenodo.org/records/1957...

#WebArchiving #AIProvenance #C2PA #OpenTimestamps #WARC

images.alt:
This document is an implementation specification for an Auto-Registration Permanent Archive Service — a system that automatically preserves web content at the moment of publication, with cryptographic tamper-evidence and legally admissible timestamping.

Key technical components: WARC-format full-page capture (ISO 28500) via Headless Chrome, RFC 3161 trusted timestamping (multi-TSA, parallel), OpenTimestamps anchoring to Bitcoin blockchain, independent observation nodes across 3 geographic regions for cross-validation, platform integration via OAuth 2.0 and Webhooks (WordPress, note, Wix, Medium, Ghost), PDF + JSON tamper-proof certificates with public verification endpoint, and genre-specific persistent identifiers (vio.paper, vio.text, vio.art, etc.).

This specification addresses a critical gap in the AI era: the inability to prove "this content existed in this exact form on this date." It serves AI provenance verification, academic citation integrity, and legal evidence use cases.

The service is owner-initiated, not third-party archiving — fundamentally different from Internet Archive or existing cache services.

This work also positions itself in relation to C2PA (Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity), identifying areas where WARC-based capture-time authenticity complements C2PA's current coverage.

Most of the people in my extended family who were murdered in the Holocaust were not killed in concentration camps.

They were forced to wait in line, usually undressed, for their turn to be shot standing over pits dug the day prior outside of the towns and cities where they lived.

I know of at least 40 who died, as young as 1 and as old as 88. 

Most were killed in intimate circumstances; many probably saw their murderers’ faces. 

This is where fascism leads. It’s not just camps and gas chambers. It’s being pushed in front of trains and being beaten by mobs.
